calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Bartolomew Pooler.

Mr. Vann addressed the issue of fees and explained services provided. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Petitioner.

The Court noted that the Petition for Final Distribution is filed. This Status is taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Return Date On The Citation
Off Calendar Sep-18-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Bartholomew Pooler.

Mr. Vann stated that the hold up on final distribution is that the Creditor who indicated that they were going to close their file and withdraw their claim, had not done so. The citation issue was taken off calendar. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to January 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Return Date On The Citation
Off Calendar Jun-26-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Bartholomew Pooler. Elizabeth MacDonald specially appearing for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Vann stated that the loan was approved, that it was funded last Friday and that they now have funds to pay the Creditors. Mr. Vann also stated that a check will be going out to Wells Fargo Bank today, that two claims were settled, that they are waiting for satisfactions and that one of the Creditors (National Dollar Stores) will withdraw their claim. Return date on the citation was continued to September 18, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was also set for that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Return Date On The Citation
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Bartholomew Pooler. Joseph Nykodym for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Vann reported that the loan application is pending an appraisal and that he has a few days in mind that he will coordinate with the appraiser. Furthermore, Mr. Vann stated that he does not have the terms of the loan and will make sure that Mr. Pooler understands it completely; if Mr. Pooler does not agree to those terms then the alternative is to sell the home. The Court encourages Mr. Pooler to make every effort to get the meeting with the appraiser completed. Mr. Vann informed Mr. Nykodym that the loan broker is Estate Financing. The citation was continued to June 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Return Date On The Citation
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Continued To May-29-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Bartholomew Pooler.

The Court noted that Mr. Clark was not present and that no request for a court call appearance was presented. Mr. Vann stated that they have taken steps to take out an estate loan to pay off all of the Creditor's, that the loan has been approved subject to an appraisal and they hope to get the appraisal within two weeks. Mr. Vann also stated that amounts owed were $3,659.40 to Citibank, $20,094.00 to Sears, $7,870.00 to Wells Fargo and $11,000.00 to National. The Citation to Require Personal Representative to Appear, etc. was continued to May 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Vann to get a Petition for Final Distribution filed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Return Date On The Citation

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Return Date On The Citation
Off Calendar Nov-28-2012 Continued To Dec-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Citation To Require Personal Representative To Appear & Show The Condition Of The Estate & Reasons Why The Estate Cannot Be Distributed & Closed.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Robert Cohen for the Moving Party.

Mr. Cohen reported that he has no contact with Mr. Vann. The Court granted the Petition for Citation (subject to receipt of order and citation). Return date on the Citation is November 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Chien.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Continued To Mar-02-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Bart Pooler. Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Sophia Andutsakis specially appearing for Counsel Rory Clark for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Vann stated that he was representing Mr. Pooler, that he was prepared to file a petition on Mr. Pooler's behalf and that he would check with the Recorder's Office to see the status of the property. The matter was continued to March 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-19-2011 Continued To Feb-16-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Adminstrator. Bart Pooler in Propria Persona.

Mr. Pooler requested a continuance stating that he was unable to file his petition because he was ill, that he has met with Mr. Vann (Attorney), that he resides in the home, that he is receiving assistance with the mortgage from his Aunt and that he has not received any foreclosure notice from the lender. The matter was continued to February 16, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Continued To Jan-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alan Sherwood for Wells Fargo Bank. Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator. Bart Pooler (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the Public Administrator was asserting its priorty over Wells Fargo Bank. Mr. Pooler stated that he plans to file his petition to administer the estate. The matter was continued to January 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of Mr. Pooler's petition.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
